fragment:
<set-variable name="isResponsesApi" value="@{
        // Reuse signal from frag-request-processor when present (Unified AI path).
        var existingResponseId = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("response-id", string.Empty);
        if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(existingResponseId)) { return true; }

        // Try Url.Path and OriginalUrl.Path (some APIM flows expose only one).
        var path = context.Request.Url?.Path ?? string.Empty;
        if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(path))
        {
            try { path = context.Request.OriginalUrl?.Path ?? string.Empty; } catch { }
        }
        if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(path)) { return false; }

        // Segment-based match: any path segment equal to "responses" (case-insensitive).
        var segments = path.Split(new[] { '/' }, StringSplitOptions.RemoveEmptyEntries);
        foreach (var seg in segments)
        {
            if (seg.Equals("responses", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)) { return true; }
        }
        return false;
    }" />

    
        <when condition="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("isResponsesApi", false))">

            
            <set-variable name="responseId" value="@{
                // Reuse value already extracted by frag-request-processor (Unified AI) when available.
                var existing = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("response-id", string.Empty);
                if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(existing)) { return existing.Trim(); }

                var method = context.Request.Method ?? string.Empty;

                // Prefer APIM-matched route parameter when the operation defines one (e.g., {response_id}).
                try
                {
                    if (context.Request.MatchedParameters != null
                        && context.Request.MatchedParameters.ContainsKey("response_id"))
                    {
                        var matched = context.Request.MatchedParameters["response_id"];
                        if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(matched)) { return matched.Trim(); }
                    }
                }
                catch { }

                var path = context.Request.Url?.Path ?? string.Empty;
                if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(path))
                {
                    try { path = context.Request.OriginalUrl?.Path ?? string.Empty; } catch { }
                }

                // GET / DELETE / sub-collections like /input_items live under /responses/{id}/...
                if (!method.Equals("POST", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
                {
                    var segments = path.Split(new[] { '/' }, StringSplitOptions.RemoveEmptyEntries);
                    for (int i = 0; i < segments.Length - 1; i++)
                    {
                        if (segments[i].Equals("responses", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
                        {
                            return segments[i + 1].Trim();
                        }
                    }
                    return string.Empty;
                }

                // POST – chained calls may carry previous_response_id in the body.
                try
                {
                    var bodyObj = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("parsed-request-body");
                    if (bodyObj == null)
                    {
                        var raw = context.Request.Body.As(preserveContent: true);
                        if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(raw)) { return string.Empty; }
                        bodyObj = JObject.Parse(raw);
                    }
                    var prev = bodyObj["previous_response_id"]?.ToString();
                    return string.IsNullOrEmpty(prev) ? string.Empty : prev.Trim();
                }
                catch { return string.Empty; }
            }" />

            
            
                <when condition="@(!string.IsNullOrEmpty(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("responseId", string.Empty)))">
                    

                    
                    
                        <when condition="@{
                            var cached = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("cachedResponseOwner", string.Empty);
                            if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(cached)) { return false; }
                            var parts = cached.Split('|');
                            var cachedSubId = parts.Length > 0 ? parts[0] : string.Empty;
                            var currentSubId = context.Subscription?.Id ?? string.Empty;
                            return !string.IsNullOrEmpty(cachedSubId)
                                && !cachedSubId.Equals(currentSubId, StringComparison.Ordinal);
                        }">
                            
                                @($"Response-id ownership mismatch. responseId={context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("responseId", string.Empty)} requestSub={context.Subscription?.Id ?? string.Empty}")
                            
                            
                                
                                
                                    application/json
                                
                                @{
                                    return new JObject(
                                        new JProperty("error", new JObject(
                                            new JProperty("message", "Access denied. The supplied response_id was created by a different subscription and cannot be accessed."),
                                            new JProperty("type", "access_error"),
                                            new JProperty("code", "response_id_forbidden")
                                        ))
                                    ).ToString();
                                }
                            
                        
                    

                    
                    
                        <when condition="@{
                            var method = context.Request.Method ?? string.Empty;
                            if (method.Equals("POST", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)) { return false; }
                            var cached = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("cachedResponseOwner", string.Empty);
                            if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(cached)) { return false; }
                            var parts = cached.Split('|');
                            return parts.Length >= 2 && !string.IsNullOrEmpty(parts[1]);
                        }">
                            <set-variable name="requestedModel" value="@{
                                var cached = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("cachedResponseOwner", string.Empty);
                                return cached.Split('|')[1];
                            }" />
                            
                                @($"Hydrated requestedModel='{context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("requestedModel", string.Empty)}' from response-id cache for {context.Request.Method} {context.Request.Url.Path}")
                            
                        
                    

                    
                    
                        <when condition="@{
                            var method = context.Request.Method ?? string.Empty;
                            if (method.Equals("POST", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)) { return false; }
                            var cached = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("cachedResponseOwner", string.Empty);
                            return string.IsNullOrEmpty(cached);
                        }">
                            
                                @($"Response-id cache miss on {context.Request.Method} {context.Request.Url.Path}. Returning 404.")
                            
                            
                                
                                
                                    application/json
                                
                                @{
                                    return new JObject(
                                        new JProperty("error", new JObject(
                                            new JProperty("message", $"The supplied response_id '{context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("responseId", string.Empty)}' is not known to the gateway. It was either never created here or the ownership cache entry has expired."),
                                            new JProperty("type", "invalid_request_error"),
                                            new JProperty("code", "response_id_not_found")
                                        ))
                                    ).ToString();
                                }
